---
title: "primprodUtil.py"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../mh1-primprod.html)

Primary productivity model utilities and daylength calculations.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.python}
{{< include ../../workflows/mh1-primprod/src/primprodUtil.py >}}
```

:::
